revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:飯部磐座神社]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Ibe Iwakura Shrine | native_name = 飯部磐座神社 | image = Ibe iwakura-jinja.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ibe Iwakura Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|35.924277777777775|136.16369444444445}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Amaterasu|lt=Amaterasu|ar|أماتيراسو|ary|أماطيراسو|az|Amaterasu|bcl|Amaterasu|be_x_old|Аматэрасу|be|Аматэрасу|bew|Amatérasu|bg|Аматерасу|ca|Amaterasu|cs|Amaterasu|da|Amaterasu|de|Amaterasu|el|Αματεράσου|en|Amaterasu|eo|Amaterasu|es|Amaterasu|et|Amaterasu|eu|Amaterasu|fa|آماتراسو|fi|Amaterasu|fr|Amaterasu|gl|Amaterasu|he|אמטראסו|hi|अमातेरसु|hr|Amaterasu|hu|Amateraszu Ómikami|hy|Ամատերասու Օմիկամի|id|Amaterasu|it|Amaterasu|ja|天照大神|jaquote|アマテラス|jv|Amaterasu|ka|ამატერასუ|ko|아마테라스 오미카미|la|Amaterasu|lb|Amaterasu|lt|Amaterasu|lv|Amaterasu|min|Amaterasu|ml|അമതേരസു|mni|ꯑꯃꯇꯦꯔꯁꯨ ꯑꯣꯃꯤꯀꯃꯤ|ms|Amaterasu|nl|Amaterasu|nn|Amaterasu|no|Amaterasu|or|ଆମାତେରାଶୁ|pa|ਆਮਾਤੇਰਸ|pl|Amaterasu|pt|Amaterasu|ro|Amaterasu|ru|Аматэрасу|sco|Amaterasu|sh|Amaterasu|simple|Amaterasu Ōmikami|sk|Amaterasu Ómikami|sl|Amaterasu|sr|Аматерасу|su|Amaterasu|sv|Amaterasu|ta|அமதெரசு|th|อามาเตราซุ|tl|Amaterasu|tr|Amaterasu|uk|Аматерасу|uz|Amaterasu|vi|Amaterasu|wuu|天照大神|zh_min_nan|Amaterasu|zh_yue|天照大神|zh|天照大神|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} }} {{nihongo|'''Ibe Iwakura Shrine'''|飯部磐座神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Echizen Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q11590310|ltq=Q11590310|qid=Q11590310|1=Shinmei shrines}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q135040126|ltq=Q135040126|qid=Q135040126|1=Yokoyamano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135040127|ltq=Q135040127|qid=Q135040127|1=Chihamura- Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Echizen, Fukui|lt=Echizen|ar|إتشيزين (فوكوي)|azb|اچیزن، فوکوئی|ceb|Echizen-shi|ce|Этидзен (гӀала)|de|Echizen|en|Echizen, Fukui|envoyage|Echizen|es|Echizen (ciudad)|et|Echizen|fa|اچیزن، فوکوئی|fi|Echizen (Fukui)|fr|Echizen (Fukui)|frvoyage|Echizen|gl|Echizen|id|Echizen, Fukui (kota)|it|Echizen|ja|越前市|ko|에치젠시|lt|Ečidzenas|ms|Echizen, Fukui (bandar)|my|အဲချိဇန်းမြို့၊ ဖုခုအိ|mzn|اچیزن، فوکوئی|nl|Echizen (stad)|pl|Echizen|pt|Echizen (cidade)|ro|Echizen|ru|Этидзен (город)|simple|Echizen, Fukui|sv|Echizen|tl|Echizen, Fukui|tr|Echizen|tt|Этидзен (шәһәр)|uk|Етідзен (Фукуй)|ur|ایچیزین، فوکوئی|uz|Etidzen|vi|Echizen, Fukui|war|Echizen, Fukui|zh_classical|越前市|zh_min_nan|Etizen-chhī|zh_yue|越前|zh|越前市|qid=Q877941|1=Echizen, Fukui}} * {{ill|Q1047144|ltq=Q1047144|qid=Q1047144|1=Echizen Province}} * {{ill|Tsuruga District, Fukui|lt=Tsuruga district|en|Tsuruga District, Fukui|ja|敦賀郡|ko|쓰루가군|zh|敦賀郡|qid=Q11499560|1=Tsuruga District, Fukui}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|35.924277777777775|136.16369444444445}} == image (P18) == * Ibe iwakura-jinja.jpg == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Q455602|ltq=Q455602|qid=Q455602|1=Amaterasu}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 182207 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Son-sha|lt=Son-sha|ja|村社|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いべいわくらじんじゃ == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '福井県越前市芝原5丁目16-1', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:飯部磐座神社]] {{wikidata link|Q28691797}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=February 2, 2017 (Thu) 04:57 (UTC)}} {{Shinto shrine |Name=Ibei Iwakura Shrine |Image=[[File:Ibei Iwakura Shrine.jpg|270px]]
Torii |Location={{ill|lt=Fukui Prefecture|Q133879|qid=Q133879|1=Fukui Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Echizen City|Q877941|qid=Q877941|1=Echizen, Fukui}} Shibahara 5-chome 16-1 |Coordinates= {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities={{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}}
{{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|qid=Q261637|lt=Hachiman Ōkami|1=Hachiman}}
{{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko no Mikoto|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}} |Sacred object= |Shrine rank={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (minor)
Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded={{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 15 ({{ill|lt=873|Q30369|qid=Q30369|1=873}}) |Main hall={{ill|lt=Nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |Other names= |Pilgrimage affiliation= |Annual festival={{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} (Autumn grand festival) |Rituals= |Map= {{Location map|Japan Fukui|label=Ibei
Iwakura Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Ibei Iwakura Shrine''' (いべいわくらじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Shibahara, {{ill|lt=Echizen City|Q877941|qid=Q877941|1=Echizen, Fukui}}, {{ill|lt=Fukui Prefecture|Q133879|qid=Q133879|1=Fukui Prefecture}}. It is listed as a {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=minor Shikinaisha|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}, and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|qid=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. Within the shrine grounds, artificially made iwakura stones transported from elsewhere are piled up. === History === A fire broke out in {{ill|lt=Kyōhō|Q1145048|qid=Q1145048|1=Kyōhō}} 11 ({{ill|lt=1726|Q6936|qid=Q6936|1=1726}}), and old records were lost. According to the information board on the shrine grounds, in {{ill|lt=Jōgan (Japan)|Q1075635|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} 15 ({{ill|lt=873|Q30369|qid=Q30369|1=873}}), a local powerful family, the Ibe no Miyatsuko Toyomochi clan, transported and stacked large rocks to create an iwakura, built a shrine hall, and founded the shrine. It is said that clan iwakura rituals were conducted there.Information board within the grounds of Ibei Iwakura Shrine. ;Main hall :Built in {{ill|lt=Bunsei|Q1327119|qid=Q1327119|1=Bunsei}} 6 ({{ill|lt=1823|Q6988|qid=Q6988|1=1823}}) August{{Cite book|Japanese|year=|title=50th Anniversary Commemorative Book of Yoshino District’s Incorporation into the City “Yoshino”|editor=|page={{Page number needed|date=February 2017}}}}. Repaired in {{ill|lt=Taishō|Q329174|qid=Q329174|1=Taishō era}} 3 ({{ill|lt=1914|Q2083|qid=Q2083|1=1914}}). ;Worship hall :Built in Taishō 4 ({{ill|lt=1915|Q2084|qid=Q2084|1=1915}}) July. ;Corridor :Built in Taishō 4 (1915) July. === Enshrined deities === *{{ill|lt=Sarutahiko|Q3090037|qid=Q3090037|lt=Sarutahiko no Mikoto|1=Sarutahiko Ōkami}} *{{ill|lt=Amaterasu|Q455602|qid=Q455602|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu}} *{{ill|lt=Hachiman|Q261637|qid=Q261637|lt=Hachiman Ōkami|1=Hachiman}} === Access === *15-minute walk from {{ill|lt=Fukui Railway Fukubu Line|Q3537109|qid=Q3537109|1=Fukui Railway Fukubu Line}} {{ill|lt=Iehisa Station|Q11455373|qid=Q11455373|1=Iehisa Station}} *25 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Hokuriku Expressway|Q1549512|qid=Q1549512|1=Hokuriku Expressway}} {{ill|lt=Takefu Interchange|Q11124799|qid=Q11124799|1=Takefu interchange}} === Notes === {{Footnote help}} === References === {{Reflist}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ibe Iwakura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ibe Iwakura Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Echizen Province]] [[Category:Shinmei shrines]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Fukui Prefecture]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Echizen city]] [[Category:History of Echizen city]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Echizen Province]] [[Category:福井県の旧村社]]
